name: search_loads
description: Search the load board for matching loads. Call this ONLY after you have origin city/state, destination city/state, equipment type, and pickup date. Returns top-3 ranked matches. If total_found is 0, no loads match — offer to try a different lane or take a callback. If partial is true, the matches are origin-only (close-but-not-exact); pitch them as such.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin city and state, e.g. 'Dallas, TX' or 'Dallas Texas'.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination city and state, e.g. 'Atlanta, GA'.

parameters.name: equipment_type
parameters.description: One of: dry_van, reefer, flatbed, step_deck, power_only. Map the carrier's words to one of these exact values.

parameters.name: pickup_date
parameters.description: Target pickup date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD. Match within ±2 days.
